messages.content: The operator opened this chat to answer the pending operator question on issue #23. Read issue #23, find its most recent "Blocked — operator needed" comment (marked `<!-- agencyx:settle:blocked-… -->`), and extract its question(s) and any options. Then you MUST pose the question to the operator by calling the `ask_user` tool with a small set of clickable options — never ask in prose, and do not just summarize the situation and stop. Only after the operator answers via `ask_user`, post that answer back to issue #23 as a comment that preserves the settle marker, so the agency resumes. Do not modify anything else on the issue.
Done. The operator confirmed GH_TOKEN is set, and I've posted that back to issue #23 with the settle marker intact — the agency will pick it up and retry shipping the PR.

activity.detail: The issue is straightforward: the work is done and review passed, but the agency can't open the PR because GitHub CLI (`gh`) isn't authenticated. There's one question to resolve:
